# dictionary_data_type_index

| Source type / method | Source location | KSY type / field | KSY location | Resolved |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `DictionaryData.load` / `DictionaryData.save` | `input/DictionaryData.java` | root | `output/dictionary_data.ksy` | Yes |
| `DictionaryData.DictInfo` | `input/DictionaryData.java` | `types.dict_info` | `output/dictionary_data.ksy` | Yes |
| `StringIO.readUTF` / `StringIO.writeUTF` | `input/DictionaryData.java` | `types.string_utf` | `output/dictionary_data.ksy` | Yes |
